fields.title: Heart of Vilas County Bike Trail
fields.text: Heart of Vilas County Bike Trail — Bicycle trail in Eagle River, WI, 10 mi. When complete, the proposed River Trail will extemd the 55-mile-long Heart of Vilas Trail System by10 miles from St Germain to Eagle River.

fields.title: River Trail
fields.text: River Trail — Bicycle trail in Eagle River, WI, 10 mi. When complete, the proposed River Trail will extemd the 55-mile-long Heart of Vilas Trail System by10 miles from St Germain to Eagle River.
